issuetype.description: For system outages or incidents. Created by JIRA Service Desk.
issuetype.name: Incident

content.text: ISSUE DESCRIPTION AND HOW TO REPRODUCE

Multiple customers are reporting that as of earlier today, their external authentication no longer works; they either get an error or are simply not redirected to the External IdP page to finish the authentication flow as expected.
Regardless of the specific behavior each customer is facing, there's a constant; we see the exact same error in Grafana for every single customer:

This is completely preventing external authentication from working, and multiple customers have reported this to us in the past few hours. We'll share a complete list of those who've reported this to us in a comment shortly after this escalation is created.
We can also this is impacting multiple customers in Grafana (

We've suggested that a customer unassign and reassign the IdP to their Production Stage as an attempt to mitigate this, but the customer still hasn't gotten back to us to let us know if it worked, and beyond that, this error is completely unprecedented for us.
TECH DATA OR ANY OTHER RELEVANT INFO
Timeline with start and end date/hour
Grafana Dashboard showing occurrences of errors across all Tenants:
[! do not remove this line, this will be used to the trigger_ Technical Support::Send to R&D - ODC _#trigger_send_to_r&d_odc !]
Please see Zendesk Support tab for further comments and attachments.

fields.summary: 502 Response when logging in with External IdPs (GET /api/user-information/v1/profiles/me)

content.text: Slack Channel was added to the incident:
: Multiple customers unable to authenticate. GS is still evaluating a workaround
– This notification was sent from Zendesk Support ticket #3253804 to all linked JIRA issues by João Januário. –
Customer from #3253772 GA eu-central-1 Tenant Id: ccb27f16-21c9-4ac3-9708-17f208a559af confirmed that the issue is getting solved.
"Users have started reporting a recovery of services without any changes on our end"
Berkay Hidiroglu has been assigned as Engineer
Berkay Hidiroglu has been assigned as Engineer
Hi! This Retrospective Readout is booked for Oct 29, 2025 11:00AM.
For any rescheduling or adjustment, please contact the Process Engineering Team.
The issue was with Identity Core / CAS version that has been rolled back and the issue was resolved. Removing Identity Business as this has nothing to do with business.
, the retrospective hasn’t been done yet, so we can’t close it. We’re waiting for the SRE team to have the capacity to do it.
Hi! We (Identity Core) are already working on the RCA, since it’s about our services
, that’s great! SREs usually lead retrospectives for incidents with system-wide impact, but in the past few weeks they haven’t had much time available for that. Any help is appreciated
Can I assign the issue to you,
Yes, you can! Thank you Inês
Following up on the feedback we need from Build Services team before we move this one for approval.
- we would appreciate help from Build Services team here to review the learnings and see if there should be any additional action items. Thanks.
I will follow up on the confluence page
